PluginManifest.Name: Kurisu.VoiceOverTools
PluginManifest.Title: Dialogue System Voice Over Helper
PluginManifest.Description: Voice-over asset helpers for dialogue projects. Rename VO files to a consistent {hexId}_{culture} scheme, clean up orphaned audio assets not referenced by any DialogueFragment, and strip non-primary translations + voice-over references in one pass. All commands include a dry-run preview.
PluginManifest.Tags: Voice-Over, Dialogue, Asset Management, Rename, Localization
PluginManifest.ReleaseNotes: V1.0.0- Initial release version V1.0.1- Purge Voice Over and Translations Feature V1.0.2- Added "Clean Up Orphaned Voice-Overs" command with dry-run / delete-Articy / delete-Articy+disk options. Added dry-run preview window to Rename commands with per-entry status (already correct / will rename / display-only / target exists / source missing) and click-to-navigate. New Articy-style dark theme for all plugin windows. Bug fixes: RemoveVoiceOvers now resumes localization state handling on exception; silent-placeholder WAV is cleaned from disk after removal; removed dead helpers and unused imports. V1.0.3- Plugin renamed from Kurisu.VoiceOverNamingScheme to Kurisu.VoiceOverTools (manifest Name, C# namespace, assembly, filenames). NOTE: this is a breaking rename — Articy treats it as a new plugin; uninstall the old one via Package Manager before installing 1.0.3. No behavioral changes. V1.0.4- Added "Audit Voice-Overs" command (Global): scans every DialogueFragment and flags VO references that are missing for a language, corrupted (broken proxy / file missing on disk / 0-byte file), or overlapping (the same audio asset is shared by multiple distinct fragments). Read-only diagnostic with per-category filter toggles and click-to-navigate (Show Fragment / Show VO Asset). V1.0.5- Audit Voice-Overs filtering: hard-filter excludes fragments with no Speaker assigned (narration / stage directions don't get false-positive "Missing VO" entries). New per-character dropdown filter combines with the category toggles. Each row's header now includes the speaker name for at-a-glance scanning.
